D2 Vision L2 Understand Atom

The Café Wall

slide the row offset and watch perfectly parallel rows of tiles bend into sloping wedges

A thin grey mortar between offset light and dark tiles is nudged by small-scale brightness processing, so each row's border appears to tilt — though every row is exactly horizontal.

Slide the row offset. Near a half-tile shift the mortar lines fan into wedges and the wall seems to lean; line the rows back up and the tilt vanishes, revealing the rows were level all along.
